title: American Academy of Achievement
body: The American Academy of Achievement (colloquially known as the Academy of Achievement) is a nonprofit corporation that recognizes high-achieving people in diverse fields and gives them the opportunity to meet one another. The academy also brings together leaders with promising graduate students for mentorship. It hosts an International Achievement Summit, which ends with an awards ceremony during which new members are inducted.
